Resources

Plain-language thinking for better WordPress decisions.

Short guides for business owners evaluating redesigns, care plans, tracking, performance, and automation.

When to redesign versus repair

A practical way to compare business goals, current-site limitations, and budget timing.

What to include in a care plan

Updates, backups, uptime awareness, content support, security habits, and review cadence.

Analytics that actually help

Track the actions your team can use: quote starts, form completions, checkout steps, and high-value content.
